expectations.text: Script uses a for/end loop to parametrically create the masses
expectations.evidence: for variable_name = i  start_value = 1  end_value = 8 ... end — single loop creates all 8 masses parametrically

expectations.text: EVAL() function is used to generate dynamic names inside the loop
expectations.evidence: (eval(".model.mass_" // RTOI(i))) and (eval(".model.mass_" // RTOI(i) // ".cm")) used throughout loop body

expectations.text: RTOI() used to convert loop integer variable to string for name construction
expectations.evidence: RTOI(i) appears in every dynamic name expression, e.g. ".model.mass_" // RTOI(i)

expectations.text: String concatenation operator // is used in name construction
expectations.evidence: ".model.mass_" // RTOI(i) // ".ref_mkr" and similar patterns used for all dynamic names

expectations.text: part create point_mass is used (NOT rigid body or generic body)
expectations.evidence: part create point_mass name_and_position used on every mass creation

expectations.text: force create element_like translational_spring_damper is used for inter-mass springs (NOT bushing, NOT spring_damper alone)
expectations.evidence: force create element_like translational_spring_damper used with spring_damper_name, i_marker_name, j_marker_name, stiffness, damping, displacement_at_preload

expectations.text: First mass is fixed to ground using spherical joint or atpoint primitive (NOT fixed joint — Adams rejects fixed joint on point masses)
expectations.evidence: constraint create joint spherical used for mass_1: i_marker_name = .model.mass_1.ref_mkr, j_marker_name = .model.ground.fix_mkr

expectations.text: 8 masses are created (loop runs 8 times or explicitly creates 8)
expectations.evidence: Loop start_value = 1 end_value = 8 runs exactly 8 iterations, one mass per iteration

expectations.text: Mass spacing is 50mm (0.05m) in some axis
Script includes simulation single_run transient command (or notes the command to run simulation)
expectations.evidence: simulation single_run transient & type = auto_select & end_time = 2.0 & number_of_steps = 2000 present at end of script

expectations.text: All keywords spelled out fully — no abbreviated commands
expectations.evidence: model create, force create body gravitational, marker create, part create point_mass name_and_position, part modify point_mass mass_properties, constraint create joint spherical, force create element_like translational_spring_damper, simulation single_run transient — all fully spelled out

expectations.text: All object names use full dot-path hierarchy
expectations.evidence: .model.ground.fix_mkr, .model.mass_1.ref_mkr, .model.fix_mass_1, .model.spring_1_2 — all names start with .model and include full hierarchy

expectations.text: No adams_id specified anywhere in the script
expectations.evidence: No adams_id keyword appears anywhere in the script

expectations.text: CMD script runs in Adams View without any ERROR: lines in aview.log (adams_view_validation)
expectations.evidence: Adams View validation result: PASSED (no ERROR: lines in aview.log)
